title: Citrusy Chewy Chinese Turkish Delight Dumplings
description: A light, chewy dumpling dessert that blends Chinese dumpling technique with sweet Turkish delight and zesty citrus flavors.
instructions: In a bowl, combine wheat flour, salt and olive oil. Gradually add water and knead until a smooth dough forms.
Cover the dough with a damp cloth and let it rest for 30 minutes.
In a separate bowl, mix shredded Turkish delight, orange zest, orange juice, lemon zest, lemon juice, sugar and cornstarch until well combined.
Divide the rested dough into 16 small portions and roll each into a 4-inch circle.
Place 1 tablespoon of the filling in the center of each wrapper.
Fold the dough over the filling to create a half-moon shape and pinch the edges to seal tightly.
Arrange the dumplings on a parchment-lined steamer tray, leaving space between them.
Steam the dumplings over high heat for 8-10 minutes until the wrappers are translucent and the filling is warm.
Serve hot, optionally drizzled with a thin sauce made from orange marmalade and a splash of lime juice.
Store leftovers in the fridge for up to 2 days; reheat in the steamer for 2 minutes before serving.
